meta.title: Gjirokastër Guest House - Stay in Albania's City of Stone
meta.description: A restored Ottoman guest house in Gjirokastra, UNESCO World Heritage city. 4 rooms, courtyard breakfast, castle views. Book direct.

hero.heading: Stay among the stones of Gjirokastër
hero.imageAlt: Stone courtyard of a restored guest house in Gjirokastra

about.heading: A story carved in stone
about.subheading: Restored. Alive. Yours for a few days.
about.body: Built in the early 19th century during the Ottoman period, this townhouse has sheltered traders, scholars, and families across two centuries. Restored over four years with local stone and original wooden joinery, it reopened as a guest house in 2012.

rooms.heading: Our rooms
rooms.subheading: Four rooms, each with its own character.

gallery.heading: The house & the city
gallery.subheading: Stone walls, cobbled streets, castle light.

items.quote: The house felt historic without losing comfort. Breakfast in the courtyard was the moment we still talk about.
items.name: Mara & Luis

items.quote: A calm base above the bazaar, with kind hosts and a castle view that made every morning feel special.
items.name: Elena

items.quote: Beautifully restored, spotless, and close to everything. We walked everywhere and slept wonderfully.
items.name: Thomas

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.subheading: We respond within a few hours. Book direct for the best rate.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Message sent. We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

footer.tagline: A stone house in Albania's most storied city.
